note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: OAuth2 bearer token from the token endpoint (client_credentials or password grant against the realm), then Authorization: Bearer for Admin REST calls.
commonIntegrationFailure: 401 invalid_token when the admin token expired or was issued for the wrong realm; 403 when the service account client lacks the realm-management roles (e.g., manage-users).
preventionRule: Use a service-account client granted realm-management roles; refresh the short-lived admin token; target the correct realm in both the token and admin URLs.
